meaning: adj.无头的,无领导者的,无头脑的,无知的
examples: Running the task in headless mode.
Headless Roaches Can Live Up To Nine days.
THE result of headless-chicken financial markets or a canary in the coal mine?
The 12 headless skeletons were found 70 years ago, along with a slate buried in the sand.
And the doctors were running around like headless chickens because they had so many to deal with.
